scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix packages/graph-model install && npm --prefix packages/shared-types install && npm --prefix packages/mock-data install --workspaces=false && npm --prefix apps/backend install && npm --prefix apps/frontend install
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/backend run build && npm --prefix apps/frontend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/backend run test && npm --prefix apps/frontend run test
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
